title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is an Anthropic feature that generates website prototypes, presentations, and landing pages from text prompts. The tutorial demonstrates accessing the tool, creating designs with predefined or custom options, and downloading generated code for responsive landing pages.
